full_text:
Fu Tong 傅彤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Tong (傅彤)was born in Yiyang. Central military advisor for the Shu forces. Died during the battle of Yiling. Fu Tong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Fu Tong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
